description_long: This is a rectangular, orange plastic toolbox tray containing a set of six hand tools, each with a black handle and metallic shaft. The tray is molded with individual slots to securely hold each tool in place, and the tools are arranged in two rows. The brand name 'TRUPER' is prominently displayed on a label in the center of the tray. The toolbox appears to be made of lightweight molded plastic, with the tools likely constructed from metal and plastic. The surface of the tray is slightly textured and matte, providing a grippy feel. There are no visible handles or latches, and the tray is open-topped, making the tools easily accessible.
description: An orange plastic tray-style toolbox with six black-handled tools and a central 'TRUPER' brand label. The open-top design features molded slots for each tool.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing all six tools, the molded slots, and the central 'TRUPER' label clearly.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the depth of the tray and the arrangement of the tools within their slots.
description_view_2: Side profile view showing the solid orange side of the tray with no visible tools or labels.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the depth and tool arrangement, with the 'TRUPER' label partially visible.
attribute_handle_type: No dedicated carrying handle is visible; the tray is designed to be gripped by its edges.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No latch or locking mechanism is visible; the tray is open-topped.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular 'TRUPER' brand logo is visible in the center of the tray, with white text on a black background.
attribute_compartment_configuration: The tray has two rows of molded slots, each holding three tools, for a total of six fixed compartments. No removable trays or dividers are visible.
attribute_external_labeling: 'TRUPER' brand label in the center of the tray
